guards: relation_kind is an exact allowlisted static role/leadership/officer/manager kind
subject and object are entity records
subject and object are not the same record
relation description and endpoint display names do not contain future/proposed/former/uncertain tokens

notably_excluded.reason: current rows often mean reporting/presentation/action to a board or committee, not durable organizational reporting structure

guards: subject is a source and object is an event
source/relation/object text has work plan or workplan provenance
event_kind is committee_meeting_agenda, committee_meeting, or committee_presentation
source/relation/object text does not contain no-item or no-meeting absence language

subagents.result: recommended a 13-row work-plan source to dated committee event planned-status slice and explicitly held no-item/no-meeting, subject_of_agenda_item, supports, and route launch/fare/postponement rows
recommended exact static role/leadership/officer/manager relation kinds and explicitly excluded reports_to because current rows are mixed reporting/presentation actions

remaining_known_holdouts.reason: mixed actuals, forecasts, budgets, goals, proposed expenditures, before/after observations; held for narrower rules
mixed report delivery and presentation semantics; not a safe durable role rule
remaining rows need separate delivered/planned/cancelled route launch, meeting, fare, and postponement policies
